title: viola hortensis
intro: Viola hortensis, also known as common pansy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Viola hortensis include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
